---
title: "fetch_data: mom-baby-link (NESTED)"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)

working_dir <- find_repo_root()
source(file.path(working_dir, "code/functions/all_functions.R"))
source(file.path(working_dir, "code/functions/nested_ingestion.R"))

registry <- load_registry()
site <- "GNV"

linkage <- read_standardized_dataset("mom_baby_link", "linkage", site, registry)
birth   <- read_standardized_dataset("mom_baby_link", "birth", site, registry)

mom_baby_link_tmp <- linkage$data %>%
  mutate(
    part_id_mom = paste0("mom-", part_id_mom_tmp),
    part_id_infant = paste0("infant-", part_id_infant_tmp)
  ) %>%
  select(-part_id_mom_tmp, -part_id_infant_tmp)

birth_df <- birth$data %>%
  mutate(
    part_id_infant = paste0("infant-", part_id_infant_tmp),
    part_dob_infant = parse_flexible_datetime(part_dob_infant_raw)
  ) %>%
  select(part_id_infant, part_dob_infant)

mom_baby_link <- mom_baby_link_tmp %>%
  left_join(birth_df, by = "part_id_infant")

# delivery_id construction (same logic as original)
mom_baby_link <- mom_baby_link %>%
  arrange(part_id_mom, part_dob_infant) %>%
  group_by(part_id_mom) %>%
  mutate(new_delivery = if_else(is.na(lag(part_dob_infant)) |
                                 as.numeric(part_dob_infant - lag(part_dob_infant)) > 3,
                               1, 0),
         delivery_id = cumsum(new_delivery)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(delivery_id = paste0("delivery-", delivery_id)) %>%
  select(part_id_mom, part_id_infant, delivery_id, part_dob_infant)

# export locally (no raw modification)
out_dir <- get_processed_dir(site)
save(mom_baby_link, file = file.path(out_dir, "mom_baby_link_nested.rda"))
```
